introSection:
Der Kleine Zar (The Little Tsar) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hansa-Park in Sierksdorf, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.

The ride has a soundtrack from IMAscore.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was first mentioned in October 2015 and slated for opening in 2016. The name "Der Kleine Zar" was later revealed. It did not open in 2016 as planned due to delays in the TÜV certification process. Following a successfull certification, the attraction opened on 7 April 2017.

fullText:
Der Kleine Zar (The Little Tsar) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hansa-Park in Sierksdorf, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.

The ride has a soundtrack from IMAscore.

The ride was first mentioned in October 2015 and slated for opening in 2016. The name "Der Kleine Zar" was later revealed. It did not open in 2016 as planned due to delays in the TÜV certification process. Following a successfull certification, the attraction opened on 7 April 2017.
